section_analysis.description: High-density technical delivery. Focus on 'Mirror' and 'Fake' identity. Glitchy electronic beat.
Sharp melodic release. 'Phony' hook. High syllabic density and technical syncopation.

lyrics.original: 造花も勝てない美しさ それは全部嘘 antipathy world
lyrics.romaji: Zouka mo katenai utsukushisa Sore wa zenbu uso antipathy world
lyrics.meta: Signature motif. Fake flowers as a metaphor for artificial happiness.

lyrics.original: パ・パ・パ・パ・フォニイ
lyrics.meta: Iconic rhythmic hook. Syllabic stutter effect.

stylistic_dna.main_instrument: Complex Percussion, Glitch Synths, Tech-Rock Guitar
